The Vision

A future, grown.

We aspire to be the solution provider of choice for sustainable quality crops — and a better life.

— Corporate Vision · Placenta Gro
Heritage · Capabilities · Reach
PlacentaGro. III / XI

A house,
four banners, one ambition.

In 2024, three companies of long-standing repute came together under a single name — Placenta Gro — to serve Egyptian agriculture with the discipline of a global house.

Placenta Gro roots back to 1988 as an Egyptian Joint-Stock company. In 2024, Baraem, El Masry and My Farm consolidated under one umbrella — pooling forty years of accumulated expertise, structured teams and trusted distribution.

Today we operate at scale across pesticides, fertilizers, seeds, biologicals and public-health solutions — agents and distributors for top-brand suppliers, with access to retailers, growers and large-scale farms across every governorate of Egypt.

— One Group · Four Companies

Mission · Principles · Conduct
PlacentaGro. IV / XI

Fast solutions.
Lasting impact.

— Three principles that govern our work
— 01 / Principle

Innovative technologies

We solve quickly. We deploy expertise and the best technologies the market offers — selected with the discipline of agronomists, not traders.

— 02 / Principle

Cost-efficient quality

Premium products at the right economics — for growers, retailers and large-scale farms whose margins depend on it.

— 03 / Principle

Responsible by design

Environmentally and socially responsible conduct — because a better life for stakeholders is the only outcome worth pursuing.

"
Whenever you see a successful business, someone once made a courageous decision.
Peter F. Drucker
Management Consultant · Author

Portfolio · Four Strategic Divisions
PlacentaGro. VII / XI

Four divisions.
One integrated solution.

— Pesticides
— Biologicals
— Seeds
— Public Health
— Division 01
● Live

Pesticides & Fertilizers

Direct business with UPL and qualified Chinese generics. The backbone of distribution — exclusive indirect routes through local distributors for major global brands.

UPL Direct Chinese Generics Top Global Brands
— Division 02
★ Strategic Focus

Biologicals

Our growth horizon. Biopesticides, biostimulants and biofertilizers — designed to attract leading global partners. Multiple products under registration.

Biopesticides Biostimulants Biofertilizers
— Division 03
● Active

Seeds

Field-crop distribution through local channels — Pioneer, Hytech and Fine Seeds. A vegetable-seeds expansion is currently under feasibility study.

Pioneer Hytech Fine Seeds Veg · Study
— Division 04
⌛ Pending

Public Health

A division held in reserve — pending the right partnership and regulatory framework to enter at scale. Watch this space.

Pending Future Pipeline
Strategic Direction · Growth Thesis
PlacentaGro. VIII / XI
— 02
Strategy

From wholesaler
to exclusive house.

Innovative. Value-driven. Built on close customer relationships and ethical conduct — shifting deliberately from local wholesale toward exclusive distribution of top-tier global brands.

01°
Innovative & value-driven
Operating in the Egyptian market with commercial discipline — innovation as the price of entry, not the differentiator.
02°
Customer intimacy & ethics
Close relationships with key players in the market — retailers, growers, large-scale farms — protected by ethical standards in every transaction.
03°
Exclusivity over wholesale
A deliberate pivot from wholesaling through local distributors toward exclusive distribution for top-notch global manufacturers.
04°
The biologicals horizon
Significant potential identified in biopesticides, biostimulants and biofertilizers — the next category where Placenta Gro intends to lead, not follow.
Strategic Partners · Global R&D Alliances
PlacentaGro. IX / XI

In partnership
with the best.

A growing roster of global manufacturers and R&D houses — each chosen for category leadership, registration depth, and shared ambition for the Egyptian market.

— 01 / Crop Protection
— Global R&D · Direct Partner

Direct business relationship — currently five products live with UPL as a flagship account, alongside qualified Chinese suppliers across the generics portfolio.

● Direct Business 5 SKUs · Live
— 02 / Biologicals
— Biological Solutions Partner

Strategic alignment in the biologicals category — Placenta Gro's identified growth frontier across biopesticides, biostimulants and biofertilizers.

— 01 / Distribution
Exclusive distribution for R&D-led brands
We distribute exclusively for major R&D brands — indirectly through local importers — reaching retailers and large-scale farms across Egypt.
— 02 / Direct Accounts
Direct relationships with UPL & Chinese suppliers
Five UPL products anchor the direct portfolio, alongside qualified Chinese manufacturers — the foundation for further exclusive direct mandates.
— 03 / Market Coverage
Full-spectrum reach across Egypt
Growers, retailers, and large-scale farms — including the export-grade producers who set the quality bar for the country.
